Off Calendar May-16-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jul-11-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Mar-16-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Susan Lee.
Petitioner: Teddy Carl Freij, Sr., present in pro per and as Guardian at litem for: Teddy Carl Freij, Jr., a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Medical Expenses $3,178.00
A net balance of $3,822.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, 5148 Broadway, Oakland, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
